$comment: Hand-curated seven-layer Atlas. Bulk layers (fleet, packs) auto-populate from atlas.json + skill-packs.json. Hand entries take precedence and add prose. Unclassified candidates surface at the bottom of the rendered page for promotion. Edit and re-run scripts/atlas-layers.mjs.
headline: Aeon Atlas — Seven Layers
subhead: A categorical map of the constellation around aaronjmars/aeon. Layers 1–3 list who. Layers 4–7 list what makes the orbit legible.

layers.title: Layer 1 — Operator's fork
layers.blurb: The maintainer's own working test bed. Runs the same skill catalog one day behind main as an unbroken backport chain. The only layer the maintainer built deliberately.

layers.title: Layer 2 — The fleet
layers.blurb: Forks running their own cron schedules in production. Every entry is a live agent operating on its operator's behalf. The layer that turned Aeon from a tool into a workload.

layers.title: Layer 3 — Community skill packs
layers.blurb: Installable skill collections that live outside the Aeon repo and are pulled in on demand by ./install-skill-pack. Counted in skill-packs.json; rendered here from the same source.

layers.title: Layer 4 — Discovery infrastructure
layers.blurb: In-repo mechanism for things outside the project to be found from inside it. Registry, installer, catalog feed.

entries.title: skill-packs.json
entries.note: Machine-readable registry of community packs. The single source of truth Layer 3 renders from.

entries.title: install-skill-pack (CLI)
entries.note: On-demand pack installer. Runs a security scan against every SKILL.md and prompts on HIGH findings before writing a file.

entries.title: sparkleware-catalog (skill)
entries.note: Joins the registry to live GitHub signals and writes skill-packs-catalog.json — the machine-readable feed Layer 5 consumes.

layers.title: Layer 5 — Storefronts
layers.blurb: Outside-the-project surfaces that consume Layer 4 feeds and render them for humans. The maintainer didn't build any of these. They exist because the feed was a public artifact.

entries.note: Browsable storefront over skill-packs-catalog.json. Independent web property.

Browsable gallery of Aeon host templates and operator deploys (Westworld Host Template, Excalidraw diagram, etc.). Storefront for the deploy/template surface the way Sparkleware is for the skill-pack surface.

layers.title: Layer 6 — Audit
layers.blurb: Tools that don't ship code — they ship receipts against the code. Run consensus benches against PRs, file structured findings, hold the kernel accountable to its own standards.

entries.note: Two-model consensus PR review (Claude Opus + GPT-5). Findings filed under aeon Issue #184 with file-and-line citations.

layers.title: Layer 7 — Intake
layers.blurb: Inbound funnel: how outside contributors land work in the kernel safely. Pre-flight scanning, secret-handling conventions, structured triage.

entries.title: pr-skill-triage (skill)
entries.note: Workflow-dispatch skill that posts a structured comment on every inbound SKILL.md PR — security scan, required secrets, cron-slot conflicts.

entries.title: prefetch / postprocess sandbox shims
entries.note: Maintainer lands scripts/prefetch-*.sh + scripts/postprocess-*.sh ahead of community SKILL.md PRs so contributors never carry secrets in their own commits.
